prompt:
Goal: Create a highly detailed anime wedding dress collection design sheet for Natsuiro Matsuri, in a bright tropical seaside bridal theme, combining a large full-body fashion illustration with a right-side catalog/specification layout.

Canvas: Vertical 3:4 poster, split composition. Left half is a full-height hero illustration; right half is an elegant cream-white bridal collection board. Use ornate thin gold borders, floral corner decorations, soft watercolor textures, and a luxurious idol merchandise/fashion reference-sheet feel.

Left hero illustration: Show one young anime idol bride standing on a sunlit beach path beside turquoise ocean water under a vivid blue sky. She has warm light brown twin-tail hair with a curled ahoge, a large side ponytail, translucent veil, white flower hair ornaments, green-and-gold striped ribbons, and a small black-and-white mascot-like hair accessory. Her face area is covered by a soft beige square blur, matching the generated image. She wears a short, frilly off-shoulder white wedding dress with a cropped bodice exposing the midriff, layered ruffle skirt, sheer lace overskirt/train, green gem accents, pearl and gold chain details, white floral waist corsage, long pale green and yellow ribbons, ankle-strap bridal heels, and a small thigh flower garter. Pose her standing on one leg with the other knee bent, holding a round bouquet of white, cream, and pale yellow roses with greenery and trailing green/yellow ribbons. Surround her with tropical palm leaves, white and yellow flowers, floating petals, sparkling sunlight, and a bright romantic summer atmosphere.

Right collection board: At the top, large elegant serif gold title text: "WEDDING DRESS" with cursive subtitle "Collection". Under it write "Natsuiro Matsuri Bridal Style 2024" and a smaller Japanese line "夏色まつり ブライダルスタイル 2024". Use a refined wedding stationery style with gold flourishes, tiny star ornaments, and cream background.

Main reference panels: Include exactly 3 tall framed full-body views across the upper right area, labeled "FRONT", "SIDE", and "BACK". FRONT shows the bride from the front holding bouquet with one leg raised; SIDE shows profile view with bouquet, veil, ribbons, and short layered skirt; BACK shows back view emphasizing open shoulders, ribboned waist, translucent lace train, and bouquet at side. The front panel face is also softly blurred.

Detail panels: Include exactly 6 smaller framed detail cards in a 3-by-2 grid beneath the main views, labeled as follows: 1) "BOUQUET" showing the rose bouquet with green/yellow ribbons; 2) "SHOULDER & MIDRIFF" showing the off-shoulder ruffled neckline, flower accents, cropped bodice, and exposed waist; 3) "TRAIN & LACE" showing translucent lace, layered train, and long ribbons; 4) "SHOES" showing strappy white bridal high-heel sandals with flower ankle decoration; 5) "BACK STYLE" showing the back of the dress, open shoulders, frills, veil, and waist corsage; 6) "RIBBON DETAIL" showing the large waist flower corsage and striped green/yellow ribbon tails. Add small Japanese explanatory body text under each card, but keep it decorative and not too dominant.

Bottom sections: On the lower left, create a framed "Design Point" box with four short Japanese bullet points and a "Color Palette" row of exactly 6 circular swatches: white, pale cream/yellow, light green, mint, sky blue, and gold glitter. On the lower right, create a framed message card headed "~ Just for You, My Darling ♡" with several lines of Japanese romantic message text, a signature line "— Natsuiro Matsuri ♡", small pink hearts, and a small bust portrait of the same character at the bottom-right with a softly blurred face.

Additional visible text: Add a small white Japanese quote in the sky on the upper left of the hero illustration, reading approximately "海風にリボンを揺らして、今日は太陽ぐらい私で煌えにいくよ〜♡". Keep all text integrated like a polished Japanese anime fashion magazine page.

Visual style: Premium anime illustration, delicate line art, pastel watercolor shading, luminous beach lighting, soft bloom, intricate lace and ruffle details, elegant gold typography, ornate wedding invitation borders, floral decorations, clean catalog layout, high detail, no photorealism.

Constraints: Use exactly 1 large hero character, exactly 3 main reference view panels, exactly 6 detail cards, exactly 6 color swatches, and exactly 1 bottom-right bust portrait. Maintain the face-blur blocks where described. No extra characters, no logos, no watermark.
